name: Lemon Marinated Sirloin Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 2 lb. sirloin steak, cut 2 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Score the fat edges of the steak.
2. Place the meat in a shallow baking dish.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients and pour over the steak.
4. Cover; let stand 4 hours in the refrigerator, turning the steak several times.
5. Remove the steak from the marinade, reserving the marinade.
6. Pat excess moisture from the steak with paper towels.
7. Grill the steak over medium-hot coals for 17 to 20 minutes, turning once.
8. Cook for an additional 15 to 17 minutes for medium-rare.
9. Heat the reserved marinade on the grill.
10. Remove the steak to a serving platter.
11. Carve the steak across the grain; spoon the marinade over slices.
12. Makes 6 servings.
